positive: A stylized, symmetrical pattern of interconnected geometric celestial bodies and mystical fauna, rendered in a clean, linocut woodblock style. The main subject features stylized crescent moons, star clusters, and graceful, mythical creatures like stylized phoenixes and ornate lunar cats, forming a dense but legible repeating motif. Use deep indigo blues, burnt orange ochre, and metallic gold accents on a creamy off-white background. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly ornamental, suitable for a repeating apparel textile print. Strong contrast, thick uniform lines, and elegant negative space are key. High detail, vector quality illustration, perfect symmetry, minimalist yet maximalist.
negative: blurry, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, logos, trademarks, dirty, low resolution, bad anatomy, ugly, extra limbs, mutated, noise, amateur drawing, photorealism
